decks.name: JavaScript Basics
decks.description: Starter cards for common JavaScript concepts.

cards.front: What does const prevent in JavaScript?
cards.back: It prevents rebinding the variable name, but objects and arrays assigned to it can still be mutated.
A Promise represents a future asynchronous result that can be fulfilled or rejected.
